overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a first-person walk through rain-soaked Los Santos streets at sunset. The camera navigates wet urban commercial blocks with neon storefronts, turns onto palm-tree lined avenues, and concludes in a parking lot approaching a convenience store.

events.description: turning right at intersection toward building with rainbow mural

agents.ego_description: walking down rain-soaked street toward intersection, passing neon-lit storefronts on the right

entered.detail: corner store with purple and green neon signage
multi-story concrete building with large colorful rainbow mural
tall skyscrapers visible in the distance against orange sunset
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban street at sunset, with a convenience store featuring neon lights on the right. The camera walks forward toward an intersection, then turns right, bringing a large building with a rainbow mural into view on the left. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance against the orange sky.

events.description: slowing slightly while approaching next intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down street lined with palm trees and low-rise commercial buildings

entered.detail: traffic signals at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: Walking down a palm-tree lined commercial street with the rainbow mural building now on the left. The street features various storefronts and commercial buildings on the right. The camera approaches an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot with scattered vehicles

events.description: turning right off the street into an open parking lot area

agents.ego_description: turning right into parking lot and walking between rows of parked vehicles

entered.detail: open asphalt parking area with puddles reflecting sunset
row of parked vehicles including an orange SUV
convenience store with illuminated 24 sign and blue roof
white metal corrugated fence bordering the parking lot

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right off the palm tree street into an open parking lot. The scene transitions from the enclosed street to a wide-open asphalt area with parked cars on both sides. A convenience store with a 24-hour sign becomes visible in the distance, and a white corrugated fence runs along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot approaching convenience store entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through parking lot toward the convenience store entrance

entered.detail: low-rise red commercial building with multiple windows
small structure with blue roof near the convenience store

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through the parking lot toward the convenience store entrance. The store with its illuminated 24 sign grows larger in the frame. Parked vehicles line both sides, and a red building is visible on the left as the camera approaches the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-soaked urban commercial district that gradually opens into a wide parking lot at sunset. It begins on a wet street beside a neon-lit convenience store, moving toward an intersection before turning right to reveal a large building with a rainbow mural against a distant orange skyline. As the camera continues forward, the environment shifts into a palm-tree lined avenue flanked by various storefronts and commercial buildings. The scene then expands as the camera turns right off the main street, transitioning from the enclosed urban corridor into a wide-open asphalt parking lot bordered by a white corrugated fence. Finally, the camera advances through rows of parked cars and past a red building, drawing closer to the illuminated 24-hour sign of a destination convenience store.
